# Numeric Spaceship

Numeric three-way comparison (spaceship operator)

```perl
$cmp_result = $a <=> $b;
```

## Expected Compilation Outcomes

### Clean Perl Output

```perl
$cmp_result = $a <=> $b;
```

### Typed Perl Output

```perl
$cmp_result = $a <=> $b;
```

### Inferred Perl Output

```perl
# Type inference not yet fully implemented
```
